Promotional Period: [month] Months

  • [Finance_amount] (amount financed after [Down_payment_amount] down payment) or $[EMI_amount] per month suggested payments with [month] months special financing which includes 2% promo fee of [Promo_Fee]
No Interest if paid in full within [month] Months*
  • On qualifying purchases made with your Medical Saunas Synchrony credit card. Interest will be charged to your account from the purchase date if the promotional balance is not paid in full within [month] months. Minimum monthly payments required.
  • *A promo fee, equal to 2% of the amount financed at time of purchase, will be shown as a separate transaction on your billing statement and included in the balance subject to this promo. Any taxes, delivery or other charges included in the amount financed will increase the related promo fee and the required monthly payments. For example, a $950 purchase with $50 in taxes and shipping costs, will be charged a promo fee equal to $20 and $1,020 will be charged to your account. No interest will be charged on the amount financed (including related promo fee), and equal monthly payments are required on such balance until it is paid in full. The payments equal the amount financed (including related promo fee) divided by the number of months in the promo period, rounded up to the next cent. These payments may be higher than the payments that would be required if this purchase was a non-promo purchase. During the last month(s) of the promo period the required monthly payment may be reduced due to the prior months’ rounding. Regular account terms apply to non-promo purchases. New Accounts as of 07/16/2024: Purchase APR 34.99%. Penalty APR 39.99%. Min Interest Charge $2.
  • Existing cardholders: See your credit card agreement terms. Subject to credit approval.
Call (818) 740-7012 to see if you qualify!

settings.yt_video_head: Medical benefits of a Medical Sauna™
settings.yt_video_content_top: Sauna usage has become increasingly popular over the last several years, as evidenced by Google trends. Respected cardiologist Dr. Jari Laukkanen, alongside experts such as Dr. Rhonda Patrick, PhD, and renowned nutritionist Thomas DeLauer, have emphasized the many potential health advantages of sauna therapy. These benefits are bolstered by companies like Medical Sauna™, which worked with over 48 doctors to construct a medical-grade facility for customers. Regular sessions in these medical saunas can help reduce risks of cardiovascular diseases, stroke, dementia, and even Alzheimer's, as well as boost blood circulation, aid muscle recovery, and provide pain relief. Adding a commercial Medical Spa to your business not only supports your community in establishing a healthy daily sauna routine but also promotes a lifestyle that offers comprehensive care for one's mental, physical, and emotional well-being.

settings.name: Charlotte F.,
settings.colcontent: I’ve noticed my heat tolerance has improved and recovery time reduced since using this sauna.

settings.name: Aiden E.,
settings.colcontent: The sturdy Hemlock build totally sold me on its lasting power. Plus, all the health perks they talk about have real research behind them, so I felt good about buying it.

settings.name: Isabella D.,
settings.colcontent: The size is perfect for small groups and the fact it's energy efficient is a big bonus.

settings.name: Ethan C.,
settings.colcontent: Heard a lot of great feedback about the skin rejuvention from using this sauna from clients and decided to try it myself. Love it and really do see difference after couple of sessions after hours. I feel a bit more relaxed but also sametime more energized? Honestly incredible and only complaint is it took too long for me to find out I love a sauna.

settings.name: Abigail B.,
settings.colcontent: The silent heating system is another feature that makes this sauna superior.

settings.name: Lucas A.,
settings.colcontent: The detox benefits this sauna provides have been a hit. Clients often express regret over not having discovered this therapeutic joy earlier.

settings.name: Emily Z.,
settings.colcontent: We ordered the spa model for our gym, and it's been a fantastic addition.

settings.name: Logan Y.,
settings.colcontent: Our gym has never been busier since we added the Commercial Spa. The insulated airflow system and the full-spectrum heaters set these saunas apart from the other brands who always make you buy extra features or install them yourself after delivery. I really appreciated that they did it without interruption to my business or my day.

settings.name: Mia X.,
settings.colcontent: This sauna is perfect for the post-gym routine

settings.name: Mason W.,
settings.colcontent: After consistent use by our regulars, I can personally vouch for its pain-relieving benefits. It's a real testament to the healing power of heat therapy.

settings.name: Sophia V.,
settings.colcontent: Adding this sauna to our business was an excellent decision. Its traditional appeal has been a major attraction for our customers as a lot of them have been avid sauna users for years as its very popular in our area.

settings.name: Benjamin U.,
settings.colcontent: Efficient and Energy Saving

settings.name: Ava T.,
settings.colcontent: Since incorporating this sauna into our wellness regime, we've observed a lot of increased recovery times with multiple clients as well as improved overall health and rise of energy levels. I will say I was not super sold on the hot therapy when I first heard of it but now I am pretty convinced.

settings.name: Noah S.,
settings.colcontent: It heats up quickly, maintains its temperature, and doesn't spike our energy bills which was a big concern with the last brand we used which we returned. A win-win for us!

settings.name: Emma R.,
settings.colcontent: The positive comments we've received on skin rejuvenation after each session have been truly encouraging.

settings.name: Makena H.,
settings.colcontent: This sauna has become the go-to spot for post-workout relaxation at our gym. The feedback on its benefits for recovery has been overwhelmingly positive and thinking of buying the next one up in the collection next time.

settings.name: Luz G.,
settings.colcontent: A five-star rating from me! Our clients consistently report muscle relaxation and pain relief after their sauna sessions. It's truly a therapeutic asset.

settings.name: Shanti N.,
settings.colcontent: This sauna has quickly become a popular hangout for our clients.

settings.name: Reza M.,
settings.colcontent: The traditional design resonates with our customers, and the health benefits, especially the skin rejuvenation, have won us rave reviews online. We are a small business in a mountain community where hot therapy is pretty popular, and a lot of locals and tourists have commented that they love it.

settings.name: Evelyn U.,
settings.colcontent: The built-in backrest has made all the difference. After a relaxing session, I'm not dealing with back pain anymore!

settings.heading: CUSTOMER
settings.textcontent: To help you decide for yourself how effective Medical Saunas are, we have listed REAL, UNCENSORED, UNEDITED reviews, emails and comments from customers who have paid for and used Medical Saunas™.
